reasoning: Query is about cherry blossom spots in Tohoku (Akita). Response returns generic Akita spots (stone circles, ravine, museum, castle, volcano) — none are cherry blossom sites. reasoning: Query asks for major sake breweries in Niigata; tool returns MAFF GI food/craft items (edamame, carrots, lotus root) — no sake at all. Niigata sake (越後杜氏, 久保田, 八海山, 〆張鶴) entirely absent. reasoning: Query about cherry blossom spots in Kansai; tool fetches Nara spots. Response leads with a minor shrine (Amanoishitate Jinja) rather than the most famous cherry spot (Yoshino).
